title: No More Squidwards
description: Removes all noses on any type of Villager, Illager, and more!
body:
This is a simple texture pack that i decided to make so i didn't want to watch Spongebob everytime i played Minecraft. This Removes all squidward-like noses from mobs like villagers and illagers and a few other mobs. 
(also btw it has **Crackers Wither Storm Mod and Friends and Foes compatability**!!)



![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e581ebad6c640deaef463f39a601a607ecf45a1.png)

Usage: Can use it in modpacks, in videos, and edit it too your liking, but **make sure you give full credit if you use it in a public thing of your own!!**
